def compute_factor(df: pl.DataFrame) -> pl.Series:
    df = df.sort(['code', 'date'])
    
    # adv20: 20-day average daily volume
    adv20 = rolling_mean(pl.col('volume'), window=20)
    
    # Inner: -1 * rank(rank(delta(close, 10)))
    delta_close_10 = delta(pl.col('close'), periods=10)
    inner = (-1) * rank(rank(delta_close_10).over('date')).over('date')
    
    # decay_linear(inner, 10)
    decayed = decay_linear(inner, window=10)
    
    # rank(rank(rank(decayed)))
    triple_rank = rank(rank(rank(decayed).over('date')).over('date')).over('date')
    
    # rank(-1 * delta(close, 3))
    delta_close_3 = delta(pl.col('close'), periods=3)
    rank_neg_delta_3 = rank((-1) * delta_close_3).over('date')
    
    # First part: triple_rank + rank(-1 * delta(close, 3))
    part1 = triple_rank + rank_neg_delta_3
    
    # Second part: sign(scale(correlation(adv20, low, 12)))
    corr = rolling_corr(adv20, pl.col('low'), window=12)
    scaled = scale(corr).over('date')
    part2 = scaled.sign()
    
    # Final factor
    factor = part1 + part2
    
    return df.select(factor).to_series()
